title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull/run workflow.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; sync & async generators, chat, embeddings, pulls.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package offering LLM, chat, embeddings and tool-calling wrappers around Ollama.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, multi-model, workspace, import/export).

title: ollama-cli (go-llama-cli)
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Go; browse, chat, manage models inside the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local LLM code completion via Ollama (inline suggestions & chat).

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Template repo showing how to build a ChatGPT-like UI with Chainlit and Ollama in <50 lines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation example using Ollama + SentenceTransformers + FAISS.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node to call Ollama models inside automation workflows.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama with async streaming and chat APIs.

title: ollama-ruby
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple generate/chat interface and model management.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples for running Ollama server plus web UIs.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama’s API.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM library for Ollama with Kotlin extensions and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local LLM chat to servers using Ollama.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that answers channel mentions with Ollama models.

title: ollama-reddit-bot
summary: Reddit bot that responds to username mentions using locally hosted Ollama models.
